args.content:
# Hawaii Trip Packing List

## Clothing
- Swimsuits
- Beachwear (shorts, t-shirts, tank tops)
- Lightweight clothing
- Flip flops/sandals
- Walking shoes
- Hat/cap for sun protection
- Sunglasses
- Light jacket or sweater for cooler evenings
- Sleepwear
- Underwear and socks

## Toiletries
- Sunscreen (reef-safe)
- After-sun lotion
- Insect repellent
- Toiletries (toothbrush, toothpaste, shampoo, etc.)
- Medications
- First aid kit
- Snorkel gear (if you have your own)

## Electronics
- Phone and charger
- Camera
- Waterproof phone case
- Power adapter (if needed)

## Travel Documents
- Passport/ID
- Flight tickets
- Hotel reservations
- Travel insurance information
- Credit cards and cash

## Other
- Reusable water bottle
- Beach bag
- Snacks for travel
- Books or entertainment for the flight
- Waterproof dry bag
- Travel pillow for the flight
